nasb.text: And all these, having gained approval through their faith, did not receive what was promised,

esv.text: And all these, though commended through their faith, did not receive what was promised,

cnv.text: 所有這些人都藉著信得了稱許，卻還沒有得著所應許的；

ccb.text: 这些人都因信心而获得赞许，但他们并未得到上帝的应许，

csbs.text: 这些人虽然都藉着信受到了赞许，还是没有领受到所应许的，
